name: VAKHRANDI
bio: VAKHRANDI is an independent music artist blending indie electronic, alternative, and ambient soundscapes. With a self-produced approach to music creation, VAKHRANDI crafts immersive sonic experiences that sit between introspection and movement.
bioExtended: Drawing from a wide palette of influences — from deep house to post-rock — each release explores new textures and emotional landscapes, building a catalog that grows with every drop.

milestones.event: First release on Spotify and Apple Music.
